sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95612" key="sou=1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σοῦ</orth>, gen. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σύ</foreign>; also of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σός</foreign>. (In <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hom.</author> </bibl> only the latter.)</entryFree>
